University of Wisconsin-Madison

Computer Sciences: Andrea C. Arpaci-Dusseau

Andrea C. Arpaci-Dusseau

Susan Beth Horwitz WARF Professor of Computer Sciences
Catherine A. Erickson Professor in the School of Computer, Data & Information Sciences

Research Interests:
File and Storage systems, Operating systems, Distributed systems, Computer Science Education
